title: Health plan benefits Q&A groundedness
description: Checks that an assistant's answer about a health plan cites only real plan-document sections and only states copays, coinsurance, deductibles, and limits that match the extracted plan evidence.

candidate_shape.conclusion: free-text answer shown to the member
candidate_shape.cited_evidence: list of plan-document section ids the answer relied on
candidate_shape.claims: list of {subject, value} benefit facts the answer asserts

evidence_shape.documents: list of {id, title, text} plan-document sections (SBC / EOC)
evidence_shape.facts: list of {id, subject, value} extracted benefit terms (copays, coinsurance, limits)
